user.title: Configure Pepper Deal Platform
user.description: Select your preferred Pepper platform and configure sorting and sync settings. Providing username and password is optional. Without login, personalized features (like user thread/comment count sensors) will not be available.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the selected Pepper platform. Check your internet connection or try again.

init.title: Pepper Options
init.description: Adjust the configuration for your Pepper integration instance.
